named_human.name: Choe Mun-yeong
named_human.role: informed of the target defect; final development verdict on C2 stays pending

finding.summary: Panel B 'increasing sulfur content' arrow runs at the same y (4.02) as its own centered label and the single \draw path crosses the label glyphs 'increasing', 'sulfur', 'content'.
finding.machine_backing: check_undeclared_geometry (schematic profile) reports 3 actionable label_crosses_semantic_path candidates (distance_pt 0.0) on nearest_text 'content'/'increasing'/'sulfur'. Fresh re-run on the hash-verified parent C1 render (repaired.pdf sha256 791d014e...) reproduced the identical set; it is the sole actionable undeclared-geometry finding (35 downranked INFO under the schematic profile).

adjudication.rationale: The arrow tex (parent C1 lines 73-74) is a single unbroken (1.25,4.02)--(5.95,4.02) path drawn BEFORE the label node; it is not gapped behind the text. The label's fill=white,inner sep=1pt box visually overpaints the middle, so it reads as interrupted, but the rendered semantic path geometry still crosses the label glyphs (distance_pt 0.0), which is what the detector flags. Host + orchestrator adjudicate this as an accidental crossing to be repaired into a true interrupted arrow.

human_record_verbatim: 사용자에게 이 결함(Panel B 'increasing sulfur content' 화살표가 자기 라벨을 관통)이 다음 대상임을 보여주고 알렸다.
우선 대상: Panel B 화살표 라인만 bounded repair (라벨 뒤로 측정된 gap을 둔 interrupted-arrow); 라벨 노드는 건드리지 않는다.

authorized: bounded repair of the Panel B 'increasing sulfur content' arrow \draw line only (split into an interrupted arrow with a measured gap behind the label)
not_authorized: final scaffold/review development verdict on C2 (stays pending)
editing the label node or any other Panel B / other-panel line
